_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Communication involves conveying information using the most effective medium and language for the audience.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to identify and resolve conflicts between data monetization objectives and data protection, privacy, and ethical obligations.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-009 (DQ, cosine: 0.474), SP-A-004 (SP, cosine: 0.447).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.4/10 (raw 0.138). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DDaT-only terms [audience, communication, conveying, effective, information, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, conflicts, data, ethical, identify, monetization] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.853 (P=0.853, R=0.853). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DDaT element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.7%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Communication involves conveying information using the most effective medium and" and "Ability to identify and resolve conflicts between data monetization objectives a". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.125 ≈ STS 0.138 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.9%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DDaT terms: [audience, communication, conveying, effective, information, involves]. WIDAI terms: [ability, conflicts, data, ethical, identify, monetization].
